genre_archetype: real-time city-link conquest with supply-line warfare
camera_perspective: top-down battlefield strategy view with slight painterly prop tilt
control_model: tap-select and drag-route army dispatch with contextual tactical ability buttons
core_loop_signature: capture villages and infrastructure nodes, reinforce through roads, cut enemy supply chains, trigger tactical skills, and seize the enemy capital
differentiation_axes: medieval city-state war map instead of abstract prefecture graph
supply-line pressure and route isolation instead of pure number flooding
terrain bottlenecks with bridges forts and barracks
mixed troop classes with readable battle packet animation
campaign province structure with realm upgrades and doctrines
forbidden_template_reuse: abstract circle-only node layout with plain straight lines
single tiny map reused with recolors across chapters
three-lane defense map disguised as conquest
static dot armies without directional marching animation
copying an older prefecture-conquest template without terrain or supply changes

map_content_budget.play_area_model: linked node battlefield with roads rivers bridges forts villages and economic support points
map_content_budget.route_or_region_count: 14 to 28 capturable nodes per stage across 25 campaign battles
map_content_budget.interactive_regions: frontline roads, river crossings, province capitals, support settlements, flank routes, and watchtower reveal zones
map_content_budget.decorative_prop_count: at least 12 decorative landmark or terrain prop clusters per map archetype
map_content_budget.camera_or_scroll_model: single-screen on small maps and pan plus light zoom on large province battlefields

secondary_player_actions: set shield wall defense on key nodes
special_rules: bridges can be damaged and repaired
risk_reward_systems: overextending to mines weakens homeland defense
fast cavalry flanks can cut routes but are fragile
saving command points for a large swing delays immediate stabilization

secondary_game_art_packs: CitrusGames Medieval Units or equivalent licensed animated medieval troop pack
asset_variety_budget.animation_tier: medium-plus top-down strategy animation with directional march packets and combat impact feedback
asset_variety_budget.minimum_distinct_sprite_families: at least 10 distinct visual families across capitals villages farms forts bridges watchtowers banners roads infantry cavalry archers and effects
asset_variety_budget.asset_reuse_note: environment and unit packs may be combined, but capitals forts bridges and troop classes must remain visually distinct and may not collapse into recolored copies
